query:
SELECT 
  id, gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam, sport,
  bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds, awayML, homeML,
  awayRunLine, awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLine, homeRunLineOdds,
  modelTotal, modelOverRate, modelUnderRate, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  modelAwayWinPct, modelHomeWinPct, modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  modelRunAt, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore
FROM games
WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-14' AND sport = 'NHL';
